name: token-saving-hooks-codex
install_doc:
git clone https://github.com/aaron-for-value/token-saving-hooks-codex.git
cd /your/project
node /path/to/token-saving-hooks-codex/setup.js          # project-level
node /path/to/token-saving-hooks-codex/setup.js --global  # global
notes: Hook-only package targeting Codex CLI (not Claude Code). Four hooks: (1) UserPromptSubmit — strips EN+ZH filler phrases and normalises whitespace in the user prompt (cache-BREAKING: rewrites conversation input); (2) PreToolUse Bash diff-guard — blocks git diff unless piped through compress-diff.sh; (3) PreToolUse dedup — blocks repeated identical bash commands; (4) Stop quality gate — checks last test output for failures. Does NOT intercept file reads (Codex PreToolUse limitation). No output compaction of tool results — only prompt rewriting and execution guards. Ported from a Claude Code equivalent; explicitly not compatible with Claude Code.
claude_md: Use `git diff | bash compress-diff.sh` to reduce token usage. Do not repeat identical bash commands.
